title: Lotkha
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Lotkha''' was a servant of [[Bwahl]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. Lotkha gave a [[Jenet/Legends|Jenet]] to Bwahl, who named the [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] "[[Jen (Jenet)|Jen]]."

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-04-03 -->[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]
